You did it.
Three puzzles. Three gifts. All yours.
Hope the journey was as good as the surprise.

I wanted your gift to feel personal. Japan reminded me of your recent trip. Germany reminded me of your roots and Ferrari reminded me of something you've always loved.

I hope this birthday brings new memories, and plenty of reasons to smile.
